data.title: InPlay Oil Corp. Acquires Pembina Cardium Assets in Major Expansion Move
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

InPlay Oil Corp. ( (TSE:IPO) ) has provided an announcement.

InPlay Oil Corp. has announced a strategic acquisition of light oil assets in the Pembina area from Obsidian Energy Ltd. for approximately $309 million. This acquisition is set to significantly increase InPlay’s production capacity and operational synergies, with over 100% increase in production and a 170% increase in light oil output, strengthening their shareholder return profile and free funds flow, while maintaining low decline, long-life reserves.

More about InPlay Oil Corp.

InPlay Oil Corp. is a company operating in the oil and gas industry, primarily focusing on the production of Cardium light oil. They are active in the Pembina area of Alberta, seeking opportunities to enhance their market presence and production capabilities.

YTD Price Performance: 5.29%

Average Trading Volume: 85,525

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$161.3M

Eclipx Group Ltd. ( (AU:FPR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

FleetPartners Group Limited has announced a daily update regarding its on-market buy-back program for its ordinary fully paid securities. The company reported that a total of 182,500 securities were bought back on the previous day, adding to the cumulative total of 72,347,899 securities previously purchased. This buy-back initiative is part of FleetPartners’ ongoing strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Triple Flag Precious Metals ( (TSE:TFPM) ) has shared an update.

Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. announced a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.055 per common share, to be distributed on March 14, 2025, to shareholders recorded by March 3, 2025. This dividend declaration signifies the company’s stable financial position and commitment to delivering shareholder value, reinforcing its strategic positioning within the precious metals industry.

More about Triple Flag Precious Metals

Triple Flag Precious Metals is a streaming and royalty company that provides financing solutions to the metals and mining industry, focusing on gold and silver. The company has investments in 236 assets across the Americas and Australia, including 17 streams and 219 royalties, supporting mines at various stages of their life cycle.

data.title: China Tontine Wines Faces Unauthorized Equity Transfers
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from China Tontine Wines Group ( (HK:0389) ) is now available.

China Tontine Wines Group Limited announced unauthorized transfers of entire equity interests in Ji An Yaluo Wine Estate and Tontine Green to Shuangfei Grape Wine without the board’s approval. The company is currently assessing the impact of these transfers on its operations and financial position, while seeking legal advice to address the situation.

More about China Tontine Wines Group

China Tontine Wines Group Limited operates in the wine industry, specializing in the manufacture and sale of wine products and the processing of grape juice. Additionally, it engages in grape plantation through its subsidiary, Tontine Green, which owns vineyards.

data.title: Brambles Reports Strong H1 2025 Growth with Upgraded Free Cash Flow Outlook
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Brambles Limited ( (AU:BXB) ) has provided an update.

Brambles Limited reported a return to volume growth with a 4% increase in sales revenue for the first half of 2025, driven by net new business wins and like-for-like volume increments. The company improved its financial performance owing to productivity enhancements and cost management, resulting in a 10% rise in Underlying Profit and an 11% increase in Profit after tax. Brambles upgraded its free cash flow outlook for FY25 by $100 million, reflecting improved asset efficiencies and reduced capital expenditures. The company also announced an on-market share buy-back and a 27% increase in interim dividends, highlighting strong cash flow generation and operational leverage.

More about Brambles Limited

Brambles Limited operates in the logistics industry, specializing in supply chain solutions primarily through the use of pallets and reusable containers. The company focuses on enhancing operational efficiencies and customer experiences through its ‘Shaping Our Future’ initiative.

YTD Price Performance: 0.40%

Average Trading Volume: 973

data.title: Coronado Global Resources Achieves Strong Revenue Amid Operational Gains
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Coronado Global Resources Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 10 Sh ( (AU:CRN) ) just unveiled an update.

Coronado Global Resources Inc. reported its third-highest annual revenue performance in 2024, driven by operational improvements and strategic investments in growth projects such as the Mammoth Underground Mine and Buchanan expansion. Despite challenges from declining metallurgical coal prices and global economic headwinds, Coronado achieved significant cost reductions and productivity gains, particularly at its Curragh operations. The company is well-positioned for future growth with ongoing projects expected to deliver low-cost production and increased margins, enhancing shareholder value.

More about Coronado Global Resources Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 10 Sh

Coronado Global Resources Inc. operates in the coal production industry, focusing on metallurgical coal, which is a key component in steel manufacturing. The company has operations in both Australia and the United States, concentrating on optimizing production and reducing costs to enhance profitability.
